title: sanicula graveolens var. septentrionalis
intro: Sanicula graveolens var. septentrionalis, also known as Northern Sanicle or Northern Snakewort, is a plant species in the carrot family that is native to North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Sanicula graveolens var. septentrionalis include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe muscle and joint pain. Sanicula graveolens var. septentrionalis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
